provenance.name: Whom should we hire and when?
What is the workforce cost and risk?
Human Resources Organization and positions API
Human Resources Leave and attendance API
Human Resources Performance and goals API
Human Resources Workforce planning and compliance API
Human Resources: Policy question answering Prompt
ZYVORA Human Resources Technical Specification v1.0

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: HR sensitive fields use explicit field-level permissions.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: Employment and compensation changes require effective dates and approval.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: Leave balances cannot become negative unless policy permits.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: Offboarding triggers access revocation and asset/document tasks.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: Performance records retain author, period, acknowledgements, and versions.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: Attendance corrections require reason and audit.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: Payroll-impacting outputs reconcile to approved employment terms.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: AI employment recommendations require human review and bias evaluation.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.
